concept.title: Using the libnmstate library in a Python application

conbody.p: The libnmstate Python library enables developers to use Nmstate in their own application.
To use the library, import it in your source code:
Note that you must install the nmstate and python3-libnmstate packages to use this library.

example.title: Querying the network state by using the libnmstate library
example.p: The following Python code imports the libnmstate library and displays the available network interfaces and their state:
example.codeblock:
import libnmstate from libnmstate.schema import Interface
net_state = libnmstate.show() for iface_state in net_state[Interface.KEY]: print(iface_state[Interface.NAME] + ": " + iface_state[Interface.STATE])
